body:
I had so much fun playing with these adorable clear stamps from Give a Girl a…

I made a bunch of Project Life cards using some of my favorite phrases so that I can just stick them into my page protectors, write a little journaling or add a photo, and call it good! While I was in Australia last fall, I had the pleasure of meeting Kellie and she introduced me to Typo by giving me a small bag of goodies! Now she's a sponsor for March, and offering a really fun giveaway. Check out her shop!

CONNECT WITH GIVE A GIRL A... | Blog | Shop

GIVEAWAY: one of these adorable Best Friends stamp sets. For your chance to win, simply leave a comment with one word to describe your best friend. Comments will close Tuesday, 19 at 8am and a winner will be announced on this post shortly after. Good luck!

UPDATED: WINNER IS #127 - Congrats! Diamond says: March 16, 2013 at 5:27 am (Edit) Hi Amy, one word would have to be Meticulous….xox
